scripts.build: node scripts/build-theme.mjs && node packages/components/build.mjs && pnpm --filter @renderkit/web build && pnpm --filter @renderkit/cli build
scripts.format: pnpm exec biome format --write apps/web/app apps/web/lib packages/components/src packages/design/src tests package.json biome.json
scripts.biome:check: pnpm exec biome check apps/web/app apps/web/lib packages/components/src packages/design/src tests package.json biome.json
scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/comment-anchor.test.ts tests/store-routes.test.ts tests/html-processor.test.ts tests/wc-render.test.ts tests/cli.test.ts
